mission.title: argo-events: Create "exotic" equivalent for Jetstream EventBuses
mission.description: Create "exotic" equivalent for Jetstream EventBuses. Requested by 12+ users.

steps.title: Check current argo-events deployment
steps.description:
Verify your argo-events version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events
helm list -n argo-events 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working argo-events installation.

steps.title: Review argo-events configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant argo-events configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events
kubectl get configmap -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-events
```
STAN [is being deprecated](https://docs.nats.io/legacy/stan/intro#warning-deprecation-notice) and [JetStream](https://docs.nats.io/nats-concepts/jetstream) is set to replace it.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Create "exotic" equivalent for Jetstream EventBuses
steps.description:
I would like to try my hand at this

For NATS streaming exotic, the format is 
```yaml
spec:
  nats:
    exotic:
```
and for native, the format is
```yaml
spec:
  nats:
    native:
```
This differs in the format for jetstream native which is
```yaml
spec:
  jetstream:
```
So how should I go ahead
```yaml
spec:
  nats:
    exotic:
```

steps.title: Upgrade argo-events to include the fix
steps.description:
If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade argo-events:
```bash
helm repo update
helm upgrade argo-events argo-events/argo-events --namespace argo-events
```
Verify the upgrade:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo-events
helm list -n argo-events
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n argo-events -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-events
kubectl get events -n argo-events --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Create "exotic" equivalent for Jetstream EventBuses" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
I would like to try my hand at this

For NATS streaming exotic, the format is 
```yaml
spec:
  nats:
    exotic:
```
and for native, the format is
```yaml
spec:
  nats:
    native:
```
This differs in the format for jetstream native which is
```yaml
spec:
  jetstream:
```
So how should I go ahead on this.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with argo-events installed or the issue environment reproducible.
